arts.ttl: Chelsea's Felix close to joining AC Milan on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Joao Felix is close to joining Serie A club AC Milan on loan until the end of the season.

Bologna have secured the services of Davide Calabria on loan from AC Milan until June 30, 2025. The 28-year-old right-back embarks on his first venture away from the Rossoneri after 11 seasons with their first team. The post OFFICIAL: Bologna Sign Davide Calabria appeared first on FootItalia.com.

AC Milan have officially secured the signing of Warren Bondo from AC Monza in a permanent transfer that marks a significant moment in the final hours of the January 2025 transfer window. The 22-year-old midfielder arrives as a direct replacement for Ismael Bennacer, who is set to depart for Marseille. The post OFFICIAL: Milan Sign Warren Bondo appeared first on FootItalia.com.
